location.office_time_required: flexible in terms of time spent remote and in-office with the ability to travel as needed

level_signals: 2+ years in a sales role focused on building relationships and closing deals
1+ years of experience in Outbound Sales
Reports to an Inside Sales Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2+ years in a sales role focused on building relationships and closing deals
You have 1+ years of experience in Outbound Sales being held to DTT minimums
You are creative, motivated, and passionate about sales and have a dynamic personality
You are comfortable working in a scaling startup environment and adapting quickly
You value collaboration and find opportunities within change
You are tech-savvy and navigate sales and internal tools quickly (Salesforce, Outreach, Sales Navigator, Google Apps)

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have experience working with Franchise accounts (nice to have)

scope.surface: Inside Account Development — SMB merchant upsell (Ads, Loyalty & Promotions on DoorDash platform)
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / marketplace upsell to SMB restaurant/merchant partners
primary_metrics_inferred: Revenue growth from upselling existing merchants
High-volume call and email activity (DTT minimums)
Merchant adoption of Ads, Loyalty & Promotions products
core_responsibilities: Transform the way businesses capture the attention and attract new consumers
Connect and collaborate with our existing partners to understand their unique goals, priorities, and current challenges
Collaborate with our Inside Account Management Team in effort to achieve the goals of our Managed Partners
Activate additional products on the DoorDash platform to empower merchant partner growth
Cultivate unique solutions through data and analytical tools
Become a pro using email marketing automation tools to creatively engage partners
Make a high volume of calls and emails to existing partners daily

green_flags: Clear product focus — Ads, Loyalty & Promotions — specific and queryable
DoorDash is a well-known, scaled company with stated benefits (premium healthcare, wellness reimbursement, parental leave)
Strong D&I commitment with explicit encouragement of underrepresented groups to apply
red_flags: High-volume call/email role held to DTT minimums — KPI-intensive environment
Role is Phoenix, AZ area-centric but remote eligibility is ambiguous — JD says flexible remote/in-office but team is described as 'predominantly located in the Phoenix, AZ and surrounding areas'

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirements and reporting structure)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and merchant partner context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from 'flexible in terms of time spent remote and in-office' language)
ambiguities: Location is described as predominantly Phoenix, AZ but the JD also references 'remote Jobs Associated With Office in NYC Only' in compliance notices, creating ambiguity about whether remote is broadly permitted or NYC-specific. Treated as hybrid with Phoenix as primary location.
DTT minimums referenced but not defined in the JD — unclear exactly what activity thresholds are required.
